chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI DATE ORDERS WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) CP No.D-5734 of 2023 Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.26720/2023. 2. For hearing of main cse. 12.03.2024. M/s. Haider Waheed and Asad Ashfaq Tola, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Meeran Muhammad Shah, Additional AG. Today, learned. Additional AG has placed on record photocopy of summary for the care laker Chief Minister alongwith its approval in respect of appointment of the Directors Finance in Public Sector Universities, as per paragraph No.67 and submitted that after following the entire procedure and the recommendations of the Search Committee various names have been approved for appointment as Directors Finance in Public Sector Universities, therefore, the allegations as contained in the contents of the instant Petition have been falsified. He also submits that as the appointments on the various aforesaid posts have been duly approved, the petitioner has no locus standi to file the instant petition under the garb of public interest litigation. particularly in view of the approval of such appointments by the Competent Authority. Learned counsel for the petitioner after going through the contents of the aforesaid summary could not offer any reasonable explanation but sulamits that out of 25 vacant posts of Directors Finance in the Public Sector Universities only appointments in five universities have been 2 approved. To this, learned Additional AG submits that similar legal procedure will also be followed for appointments of the Directors Finance in the remaining public sector universities. The undertaking made by the learned Additional AG is taken on record.

To this, learned Additional AG submits that similar legal procedure will also be followed for appointments of the Directors Finance in the remaining public sector universities. The undertaking made by the learned Additional AG is taken on record. In view of above undertaking, we are of the view that the petition has served its purpose and stands disposed of accordingly. In case of any further grievance relating to such appointments, the petitioner will be at liberty to file fresh petition, which will be decided on its own merits. Chief Justice Judge Naseem
